description: Create a plan-view drawing of a straight-run staircase in LibreCAD using Millimeters. The drawing must include three layers: 'Treads', 'Labels', and 'Dimensions'. On the 'Treads' layer, draw a 10-tread staircase starting at the origin (0,0) with a tread width of 900 mm and a tread depth of 250 mm. On the 'Labels' layer, number the risers '1' through '10' centered on each tread and include the text 'UP' with a direction arrow pointing in the +Y direction. On the 'Dimensions' layer, include linear dimensions for the total run and the stair width. Save the final drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/staircase_plan.dxf.
